name: Asparagus Omelet
recipeIngredient: 2 cups soft bread crumbs (3 slices bread)
2 cups cooked ham or chicken, cubed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the asparagus spears into small pieces and cook until they are tender-crisp.
2. In a large bowl, combine the remaining ingredients: eggs, milk, cheese, salt, butter, onion, and bread crumbs.
3. Mix the asparagus with the egg mixture and pour the batter into a greased 2-quart baking dish.
4. Bake in a moderate oven (300°F to 325°F) for 1 1/4 hours, or until set.
